note:
腾讯牵头向3D虚拟世界Avakin Life的开发商洛克伍德出版公司(Lockwood Publishing)投资2500万美元。
这是一种押注，认为手机游戏制造商建立虚拟现实的机会可能与PC或游戏机平台一样大。虚拟世界是一组相互关联的虚拟世界，就像《雪崩》(Snow Crash)和《一号玩家》(Ready Player One)等小说中的虚拟世界一样。(VentureBeat在1月26日至1月27日的下一场GamesBeat活动将部分聚焦于虚拟现实)。
Avakin Life在iOS和Android上有超过2亿注册用户，超过100万人每天至少回来一次。之前的投资者Novator Partners、大卫·赫尔加森(David Helason)和希尔马尔·佩特森(Hilmar Pétursson)也参与了这轮融资。洛克伍德出版公司首席执行官哈里·比约恩松(Halli Bjornsson)在接受GamesBeat采访时表示，总共花了大约一年的时间才完成交易。
这笔资金是对该公司对Avakin Life的单一关注的一种认可，随着人们在他们的虚拟世界中购买定制的物品，该公司的强大参与度和货币化正在带来回报。值得注意的是，Avakin Life与其说是一个游戏，不如说是一个社交场所。腾讯副总裁王博与该公司就这笔资金进行了合作。腾讯继续对游戏公司进行投资，不过这些天更多的注意力放在了欧洲。
Avakin Life是总部位于英国诺丁汉的洛克伍德出版公司(Lockwood Publishing)长期卷土重来的一部分。
乔尔·坎普(Joel Kemp)和比约恩松(Bjornsson)于2009年创立了洛克伍德出版公司(Lockwood Publishing)，他们决定专注于为PlayStation Home制作3D化身的逼真游戏。PlayStation Home是索尼雄心勃勃的虚拟世界，于2008年底推出，用于PlayStation 3视频游戏机。Home的热门游戏之一是由Outso开发并由洛克伍德出版公司出版的在线游戏Sodium。
但是，尽管PlayStation Home产生了一批核心粉丝，但它并没有吸引到维持下去所需的大众。索尼在2015年关闭了它。
这对洛克伍德出版公司来说是艰难的，因为它把所有的鸡蛋都放在了这个篮子里。因此，该公司在进入生存模式时，将团队规模从60人缩减至12人左右。
洛克伍德开始制作手机游戏，第四款游戏大受欢迎：《埃瓦金生活》(Avakin Life)。这里的教训是，社交成分比游戏更重要。通过抓住每一个机会让它变得更加社交化，Avakin Life拥有了更多的腿。
比约恩松说：“如果你把这当作一个游戏来做，你可能会错误地认为这个游戏就是让人们留在那里的东西。”“关键是让它成为一个社交场所。”
这款游戏于2013年在Google Play上发布，受到了想要在安全的虚拟世界中表达自己的玩家的追捧。这款游戏也在iOS上首次亮相，并呈指数级增长。今年，Avakin Life的注册用户达到2亿。
比约恩松说：“这是一项繁重的工作。”“如果我们知道有多少工作，我们可能一开始就不会开始工作。它在一夜之间取得了相当长的成功。“。
但它得到了回报，特别是在该公司清除了所有阻碍支付的漏洞之后。时机也很好，因为手机在显示3D图形动画方面开始变得更好。在个人电脑上，虚拟世界开始走下坡路，因为它们达不到炒作的程度，但也有一些例外(比如魔兽世界，尽管它在2004年推出，但仍然有数百万玩家)。
对于洛克伍德来说，Avakin Life的增长需要大幅扩张，因为开发者不得不不断播种虚拟物品和其他商品，玩家可以在世界上购买这些物品。洛克伍德现在有200多名开发人员，分布在四个办事处。
比约恩松说：“我们一直致力于它，因为它一开始就获得了如此多的下载量。”“我们在时机上很幸运。”
洛克伍德需要很多人，因为它已经采取了提供虚拟世界中所有物品的方法：装饰品、衣服、住宅、家具和配件。其他虚拟世界游戏，如罗伯克斯、我的世界和第二人生，依靠玩家创造世界上的一切。
比约恩松说，随着时间的推移，洛克伍德可能会考虑用户生成的内容。但这将需要大量投资。比约恩松仍然专注于为社区生成内容，让社区变得更丰富，这样玩家就可以更有创造力。他还在考虑如何把社区变成更大的东西，比如化身。
比约恩松说：“我们一直对虚拟现实感兴趣。”“在某种程度上，我们已经在那里了。您可以登录到不同的位置。从准备好的玩家一号开始，就有了这个关于绿洲的浪漫想法。你可以在你集体想象的世界里生存和玩耍。“。
比约恩松说，他从小就受到《星球大战》、《星际迷航》和《创》等科幻世界的启发，关于虚拟世界的故事也随着《一号玩家》的出现而传播到新一代。他说：我们现在可以通过侠盗猎车线(Grand Theft Auto Online)的形式使用虚拟现实的一部分，但你不能在朋友列表和头像属性完好无损的情况下立即从一个世界转移到另一个世界。他说：当你能实时做到这一点时，那才是真正的虚拟世界。
当这成为可能时，虚拟现实可能会起飞，因为多代人已经准备好走出Zoomverse，进入更令人兴奋的领域。
但是，尽管化身很吸引人，比约恩松并不想把目光从此时此地移开，这对洛克伍德来说是Avakin Life的目标。该公司从未在营销方面投入太多资金，它避免了围绕Avakin Life的炒作周期，实现了有机增长。
比约恩松说：“你创造了某种空间，超越了你对人们想要什么的先入为主的看法。”“这就是我们看到球员真正在更大程度上影响他们想要的东西的地方。”作为一名游戏开发者，你有时很容易落入这样的陷阱，人们想玩我的游戏。但实际上，他们还有其他一些欲望。你给他们空间去做这件事。“。
该公司也没有刻意创建虚拟世界。它成为竞争者的事实几乎是偶然的，正如一些人所说的2D虚拟现实-就像《动物穿越：新地平线》(Animal Crossing：New Horizons)一样-比起3D世界更有可能聚集用户。
比约恩松说：“我们看到了一个世界的发展和社区的形成需要多长时间。”“我们看到了社交的重要性。但我们陷入了这样的境地。我们的风格一直是稳步的有机增长。“
note_en:
Tencent has led a $25 million investment in  Lockwood Publishing, the maker of the 3D virtual world  Avakin Life.
 It’s a bet that makers of mobile games may have just as much chance of building a  metaverse as PC or console platforms. The metaverse is a group of virtual worlds that are all interconnected, like in novels such as   Snow Crash and   Ready Player One. (VentureBeat’s next  GamesBeat event on January 26-January 27 will focus in part on the metaverse).
  Avakin Life has more than 200 million registered users on iOS and Android and more than a million who come back at least once a day. Previous investors Novator Partners, David Helgason, and Hilmar Pétursson also participated in the funding round. All told, it took about a year to close the deal, said Lockwood Publishing CEO Halli Bjornsson in an interview with GamesBeat.
 The funding is a recognition that the company’s singular focus on Avakin Life is paying off with strong engagement and monetization as people buy customized objects in their virtual world. It’s worth noting that Avakin Life is more of a social place than a game. Tencent VP Bo Wang worked with the company on the funding. Tencent continues to invest in game companies, though with  a greater focus on Europe these days.
   Avakin Life has been part of a long comeback for Nottingham, United Kingdom-based Lockwood Publishing.
 Joel Kemp and Bjornsson founded Lockwood Publishing in 2009, and they decided to focus on making realistic games with 3D avatars for PlayStation Home, the ambitious Sony virtual world that was launched in late 2008 for the PlayStation 3 video game console. One of Home’s hits was Sodium, an online game developed by Outso and published by Lockwood Publishing.
 But while PlayStation Home generated a core group of fans, it didn’t get the masses needed to keep it going. Sony shut it in 2015.
 That was tough for Lockwood Publishing as it had all of its eggs in that basket. So the company scaled back from a team of 60 people down to about a dozen as it went into survival mode.
 Lockwood started making mobile games, and the fourth one turned out to be a hit: Avakin Life. The lesson here was that the social component was more important than the game. By making it more social at every opportunity, Avakin Life had more legs.
 “If you had done this as a game, you might have wrongly thought that the game was the thing that was keeping people there,” Bjornsson said. “The key is making it a social place.”
 Launched in 2013 on Google Play, the game got traction with players who wanted to express themselves in a safe virtual world. The game also debuted on iOS, and it grew exponentially. This year, Avakin Life hit 200 million registered users.
 “It was a lot of work,” Bjornsson said. “If we had known how much work, we might not have started it in the first place. It’s been quite a long overnight success.”
   But it paid off, particularly after the company got rid of all of the bugs that stood in the way of paying for things. The timing was good, too, as mobile phones started getting better at showing 3D graphics animations. On the PC, virtual worlds started going into declines as they couldn’t live up to the hype, with some exceptions (like World of Warcraft, which still has millions of players despite launching in 2004).
 For Lockwood, the growth of Avakin Life required a big expansion, as the developers had to keep seeding virtual items and other merchandise that players could buy into the world. There are now more than 200 developers across four offices at Lockwood.
 “We’ve always been so committed to it, because it got so many downloads at the outset,” Bjornsson said. “We were lucky with the timing.”
 Lockwood needs a lot of people because it has taken the approach of supplying all of the objects in the virtual world: the decorations, clothes, homes, furniture, and accessories. Other virtual world games like Roblox, Minecraft, and Second Life rely upon the players to create everything in the world.
   Over time, Lockwood may consider user-generated content, Bjornsson said. But that would require a lot of investment. And Bjornsson remains focused on generating content for the community, making it richer so players can be more creative. He is also thinking about how to turn the community into something bigger, like a metaverse.
 “We’ve always been interested in the metaverse,” Bjornsson said. “In a way, we are already there. You log in to different locations. There’s this romantic idea of the Oasis from  Ready Player One. You can exist and play in a world of your collective imagination.”
 Bjornsson was inspired by science fiction worlds like  Star Wars,  Star Trek, and  Tron when he was growing up, and the storytelling about the metaverse has been spreading to new generations with  Ready Player One, he said. We have parts of the metaverse available today in the form of Grand Theft Auto Online, he said, but you can’t instantly transfer from one world to another with all of your friend lists and avatar attributes intact. When you can do that in real-time, that’s the real metaverse, he said.
 When that becomes possible, the metaverse could take off, as multiple generations are ready to get out of the Zoomverse and go into something more exciting.
  But while the metaverse is attractive, Bjornsson doesn’t want to take his eye off the here and now, which is for Lockwood’s purposes Avakin Life. The company never invested much in marketing and it has avoided a hype cycle around Avakin Life, growing organically.
 “You create some sort of space beyond your preconceptions about what people would want,” Bjornsson said. “And that’s really where we see the players really influencing to a much greater extent what they want. As a game developer, you sometimes you can easily fall into this trap that people want to play my game. But actually, they have some other desires. You give them the space to do that.”
 The company also hasn’t deliberately set out to create a metaverse. The fact that it’s a contender is almost accidental, just as some folks say the 2D metaverse — like with Animal Crossing: New Horizons — is more likely to amass users than a 3D universe.
 “We saw how long it takes to develop a world and for the community to form,” Bjornsson said. “We saw how important social is. But we fell into this. Our style has been steady organic growth.”
title: 洛克伍德出版公司(Lockwood Publishing)筹集了2500万美元，腾讯领投。Avakin Life是一款在iOS和Android上广受欢迎的模拟和角色扮演游戏，DAU超过100万。
title_en: Lockwood Publishing, makers of Avakin Life, a popular simulation and role-playing game on iOS and Android with over 1M DAUs, raises $25M led by Tencent

note_en: Valued at more than US$30 billion in its most recent funding, Kuaishou chose to list in Hong Kong as the United States government increased its censorship of Chinese firms and especially technology giants.

title_en: Filing: Chinese short video startup Kuaishou files for a Hong Kong IPO without disclosing how much it plans to raise; Kuaishou has 776M MAUs

note:
优步股价周四盘后一度下跌4%，该公司公布的第三季度营收低于华尔街的预期，但在公司财报电话会议上有所回升，首席执行长表示，有初步迹象表明，其核心叫车业务将从Covid 19疫情中完全恢复。
以下是该公司在截至2020年9月30日的一段时间内的表现，与华尔街分析师的预期相比：
亏损：根据Refinitiv调查的分析师的共识，每股亏损0.62美元，而预期每股亏损0.65美元。
总体而言，优步在GAAP基础上本季度亏损10.9亿美元，较一年前的亏损11.6亿美元有所改善。
第三季度，包括优步核心打车业务在内的移动调整后净营收同比下降52%，至13.7亿美元，而包括优步Eats在内的送货调整后净营收同比增长190%，至11.4亿美元。调整后的净收入是一种非GAAP衡量标准，它衡量的是收入减去司机激励、司机推荐付款以及为Covid 19保护设备向司机报销的成本。
该公司重申，优步预计到2021年底在EBITDA基础上实现盈利。
在讨论业绩的电话会议上，首席执行官Dara Khosrowshahi表示，尽管过去8个月很艰难，但有初步迹象表明，该公司的核心移动业务将全面复苏。他说，第三季度，优步在美国前15个市场中的11个市场的地位有所改善，包括纽约市、芝加哥和亚特兰大。
他说，优步的回归速度比其他交通工具更快，包括许多城市的公共交通和纽约市的出租车。一项不戴面具、不骑车的政策正在帮助该公司劝退乘客，尽管Covid 19存在担忧。这位首席执行官说，当城市恢复时，优步就会回来。如果说有什么不同的话，那就是优步是一种比其他交通工具更具优势的交通工具。
优步(Uber)的股价周三飙升，周四在财报公布前继续攀升，此前该公司提出的投票措施--22号提案(Propose22)在加州选举中赢得了选民的支持。
22号提案允许优步及其同行和竞争对手Lyft、Insta和DoorDash将他们的司机和快递员视为独立的承包商，而不是员工。这意味着优步将避免为司机提供全套福利和保护的成本，包括带薪病假和其他休假、失业保险和医疗保健。
取而代之的是，根据加利福尼亚州的第22号提案，优步将向符合条件的司机支付部分福利，比如高于联邦最低工资的最低基本工资，以及对司机的医疗保险补贴，补贴金额基于司机的工作小时数。
Khosrowshahi表示，在电话会议上，优步将继续在全美倡导像22号提案这样的投票措施。
除了为保持其商业模式而进行的政治斗争外，优步在2020年的大部分时间里都面临着与疫情相关的负面影响，其主要叫车业务将受到影响。然而，由于各种医疗命令和边境政策限制了旅行和通勤，优步用户订购了更多通过优步Eats送货的餐食。
随着优步的外卖业务在2020年第二季度超过了其核心打车业务，优步在7月份同意收购快递服务Postmate，这笔交易价值约26.5亿美元。Postmate曾被视为优步Eats的竞争对手。早些时候，它收购了食品杂货快递公司Cornershop，并于上月开始在纽约市提供食品杂货快递服务。
Khosrowshahi表示，优步Eats目前在其平台上有56万家餐厅，包括美国约30%的餐厅，法国约15%的餐厅。尽管他拒绝猜测优步的移动或送货业务是否会变得更大、更长远，但他表示，他相信送货(包括餐饮和食品杂货)的总目标市场至少与打车市场一样大。
自第二季度报告以来，优步筹集了5亿美元的股权融资，以推动其物流部门优步货运(Uber Freight)的增长。优步在一份声明中表示，该业务部门于2017年成立，融资后估值为33亿美元。优步货运(Uber Freight)在2020年第三季度的总预订量仅为2.9亿美元，比去年同期增长了30%。
note_en:
Uber shares dropped as much as 4% after-hours Thursday as the company  reported third quarter revenue that missed Wall Street's expectations, but picked up during the company's earnings call when the CEO said there are early signs its core ride-hailing business would fully recover from the Covid 19 pandemic.
 Here's how the company performed versus what Wall Street analysts were expecting for the period ending September 30, 2020:
 Losses: 62 cents per share vs. 65 cents per share expected, according to a consensus of analysts surveyed by Refinitiv.
  Overall,  Uber lost $1.09 billion on a GAAP basis during the quarter, an improvement from a year ago when their losses amounted to $1.16 billion.
   Mobility adjusted net revenue, including Uber's core Rides business, declined 52% year-over-year to $1.37 billion for the third quarter, while Delivery adjusted net revenue, including from Uber Eats, grew 190% year-over-year to $1.14 billion . Adjusted net revenue is a non-GAAP measurement that measures revenue minus driver incentives, driver referral payments, and the cost of reimbursing drivers for Covid 19 protection equipment.
 The company reiterated guidance that Uber expects to be profitable on an EBITDA basis by the end of 2021.
 On a conference call to discuss results, CEO Dara Khosrowshahi said while the last 8 months had been tough, there were early signs that the company's core mobility business would fully recover. He said Uber had improved its position in 11 of the top 15 markets in the United States during the third quarter including New York City, Chicago and Atlanta.
  He said Uber rides were coming back faster than other transportation alternatives, including mass transit in many cities and taxis in New York City. A "no-mask-no-ride" policy is helping the company coax riders back out, despite Covid 19 concerns. The CEO said, "Uber comes back when cities come back. If anything, Uber is an advantaged form of transportation versus others."
 Uber shares had skyrocketed on Wednesday and continued climbing Thursday ahead of earnings, after the company's proposed ballot measure, Proposition 22, won voters' support in California elections.
 Prop 22 allows Uber, along with its peers and competitors  Lyft, Instacart and DoorDash, to treat their drivers and couriers as independent contractors, not employees. That means Uber will avoid the costs of providing a full slate of benefits and protections for drivers, including paid sick days and other time-off, unemployment insurance and healthcare.
 Instead, under Prop 22 in California, Uber will pay qualifying drivers partial benefits, like a minimum base pay that's better than federal minimum wage, and a subsidy on drivers' health insurance, with the subsidy amount based on how many hours they work.
 Khosrowshahi said, on the call, Uber will continue to advocate for ballot measures like Prop 22 across the U.S.
 Besides the  political fight to preserve their business model, Uber has faced pandemic-related negative impacts to its main ride hailing business through most of 2020. As a variety of health orders and border policies limited travel and commuting, however, Uber users ordered more meals for delivery via Uber Eats.
 With its food delivery business outpacing its core rides business in the second quarter of 2020, Uber  agreed to buy out the courier service Postmates, once seen as a competitor to Uber Eats, for a deal valued around $2.65 billion in July. Earlier, it  acquired Cornershop, a grocery delivery business, and started making grocery deliveries in New York City last month.
 Khosrowshahi said Uber Eats now has 560,000 restaurants on its platform, including about 30% of restaurants in the US, and about 15% of those in France. While he declined to guess whether Uber's mobility or delivery business is going to be bigger, long-term, he said that he believes the total addressable market for deliveries, including meals and groceries, was at least as big as the market for rides.
 Since its second-quarter report, Uber raised half a billion dollars in equity funding to fuel the growth of its logistics arm, Uber Freight. That business unit, which Uber started in 2017, has a post-money valuation of $3.3 billion, the  company said in a statement. Uber Freight recorded just $290 million in gross bookings during the third quarter of 2020, a 30% increase from the same time last year.
title: 优步第三季度：收入31.3亿美元，同比下降18%，净亏损11亿美元，移动总预订量同比下降50%；递送收入同比增长125%，至14.5亿美元，总预订量增长135%
title_en: Uber Q3: $3.13B revenue, down 18% YoY, net loss of $1.1B, mobility gross bookings down 50% YoY; Delivery revenue grew 125% YoY to $1.45B, gross bookings up 135%

title: Dropbox第三季度营收为4.874亿美元，同比增长14%，超出预期，高于预期的4.836亿美元。Dropbox表示，其付费用户从去年同期的1400万增加到1525万

note:
在疫情持续之际，雅虎周四下午公布的第三季度财报超出了华尔街的预期，流媒体播放时间连续第二个季度飙升，推动该股在盘后交易中上涨逾4%，此前该股在正常交易时段上涨了4.4%。
根据该公司的数据，活跃账户增加了43%，达到4600万，流媒体时长增加了54%，达到148亿。
Roku公布第三季度营收为4.517亿美元，同比增长73%，好于分析师对截至9月底的季度3.678亿美元的预期。稀释后每股收益为9美分，超出每股亏损40美分的预期。
随着冠状病毒危机持续到第八个月，观众继续转向流媒体节目娱乐，而不是去电影院或选择其他集体娱乐选择。这意味着Roku的广告收入和播放器销量都有所增加，后者比上一季度增长了57%，这是这家流媒体设备公司称，这是这家流媒体设备公司七年多来最强劲的播放器收入同比增长。
“我们不会回到过去的样子--Covid引发了营销者…方式的持久、持久的改变。”Roku首席财务官史蒂夫·劳登在电话会议上说。他说，Roku看到花费超过100万美元的广告商100%留住了广告商，预计他们不会回到线性平台。
在本季度，Roku推出了几款新产品，包括4K HDR流媒体播放器Roku Ultra和拖缆-音棒混合设备He Roku Streambar。
Roku平台业务高级副总裁斯科特·罗森博格在一份声明中表示：“第三季度货币化视频广告播放量同比增长近90%，而第二季度同比增长约50%。”“不仅现有品牌的支出在增加，许多新的广告商也在转向流媒体，因为越来越多的剪线消费者变得无法接触到传统线性电视上的品牌。”第三季度，首次投放广告的客户同比增加了一倍多，一旦品牌习惯了流媒体的卓越表现，他们往往会继续使用Roku。在2019年第三季度在Roku上花费100万美元或更多的品牌中，有97%的品牌在2020年第三季度继续投资。
Roku估计，第四季度营收增长将与之前的假日季持平，在40%左右。
在财报电话会议上，Roku首席执行官安东尼·伍德(Anthony Wood)表示，该季度反映了公司积极趋势的汇合，但他指出，宏观环境的不确定性-从全球冠状病毒卷土重来到消费者支出水平-导致第四季度数据缺乏正式指引。该公司2月份发布的疫情前全年展望显示，全年营收同比增长42%，EBITDA接近盈亏平衡，亏损1.6亿至1.8亿美元。
Roku Channel的覆盖范围扩大到5400万人，参加电话会议的高管表示，他们对此非常满意。劳登说，这为Roku作为一个频道打开了更多的可能性。
伍德和首席财务官史蒂夫·劳登在公司的股东信中指出：“随着我们继续在Roku Channel上为用户提供更多的内容和功能，我们相信我们的观众将从Roku Channel中获得更多内容，它将成为我们内容合作伙伴的一个更重要的经济来源，”伍德和首席财务官史蒂夫·劳登(Steve Louden)在公司的股东信中指出。
针对沃尔玛和康卡斯特正在洽谈销售智能电视的报道，伍德表示，其平台是专门为电视打造的，允许制造商生产成本更低的电视。他还重申了对Roku品牌及其在市场上的竞争优势的信心。
他说：“沃尔玛是Roku的一个非常强大的合作伙伴，我们与他们的关系很好，他们每年销售数百万台Rokus。”他补充说，沃尔玛投入了大量工作来确保其与沃尔玛的关系保持牢固。
note_en:
Amid the ongoing pandemic,  ’s third-quarter financial results topped Wall Street’s estimates Thursday afternoon as streaming hours spiked for another consecutive quarter, sending the stock up over 4% in after-hours trading, on top of a 4.4% gain during the regular trading session.
 Active accounts popped by 43% to 46 million, according to the company, while streaming hours rose 54% to 14.8 billion.
 Roku reported $451.7 million in Q3 revenue, marking an 73% year-over-year increase during the quarter, better than the $367.8 million in revenue that analysts had expected for the September-ended quarter. Diluted earnings of 9 cents a share beat forecasts for a loss of 40 cents a share.
  As the coronavirus crisis continues into its eighth month, viewers continue to turn to streaming programming for entertainment in lieu of going to movie theaters or opting for other group entertainment options. That has translated to increased ad revenue and player unit sales for Roku, the latter of which grew 57% from the prior-year quarter, the “strongest year-over-year player revenue growth in over seven years,” per the streaming-device company.
  “We’re not going back to the way it was — COVID triggered a lasting, durable change in how marketers… are thinking about their TV ad spend,” said Roku CFO Steve Louden on the call. Roku is seeing 100% retention in advertisers who spend more than $1 million, he said, and does not anticipate them moving back to linear platforms.
 During the quarter, Roku introduced several new products, incluing the 4K HDR streaming player Roku Ultra and he Roku Streambar, a streamer-soundbar hybrid device.
 “Monetized video ad impressions were up almost 90% year-over-year in Q3, up sharply vs roughly 50% year-over-year in Q2,” said Scott Rosenberg, senior vice president of Roku’s platform business in a statement. “Not only are existing brands growing spend but many new advertisers are shifting into streaming as more and more cord-cutting consumers become unreachable to brands on traditional linear television. First-time advertisers more than doubled year-over-year in Q3 and once brands become accustomed to the superior performance of streaming they tend to stay with Roku. Ninety-seven percent of brands that spent $1 million or more with Roku in Q3 2019 continued to invest in Q3 2020.”
 Roku estimates that Q4 revenue growth will be in line with previous holiday seasons, in the mid-40% range.
 During the earnings call, Roku CEO Anthony Wood said the quarter reflected a confluence of positive trends for the company, but noted that the uncertainty in the macro environment — from global coronavirus resurgences to consumer spending levels — contributed to the lack of formal guidance for Q4 numbers. The company’s  pre-pandemic full-year outlook, issued in February, guided for 42% year-over-year revenue growth for the year, approximately breakeven EBITDA and a loss of $160 million to $180 million.
 The Roku Channel grew its reach to 54 million people, which execs on the call said they were every pleased with. Louden said it “opens more possibilities” for Roku as a channel.
  “As we continue to offer users more content and features in The Roku Channel, we believe our viewers will stream more content from within it and it will become an even more important source of economics to our content partners,” Wood and CFO Steve Louden noted in the company’s shareholder letter.
 Addressing concerns about reports that  Walmart and Comcast are in talks to sell smart TVs, Wood said that its platform is “purpose-built for television,” and allows manufacturers to build TVs that cost less. He also reiterated faith in the Roku brand and its competitive advantage in the market.
 “Walmart is a very strong partner of Roku’s — we have a great relationship with them, they sell millions of Rokus a year,” he said, adding that the company puts a lot of work into making sure its relationship with Walmart remains strong.
title: Roku在第三季度的收入为4.517亿美元，同比增长73%，而预计收入为3.678亿美元，活跃账户同比增长43%，达到4600万，货币化视频广告印象同比增长近90%。
title_en: Roku beats in Q3 with revenue of $451.7M, up 73% YoY, vs. $367.8M est., active accounts up 43% YoY to 46M, monetized video ad impressions up nearly 90% YoY

note:
运营广受欢迎的UPI支付基础设施的印度国家支付公司(NPCI)周四晚间表示，已批准WhatsApp在印度推出基于UPI的支付。
与谷歌、三星和其他一些公司一样，WhatsApp将其支付服务建立在UPI之上，UPI是由印度大型银行联盟建立的支付基础设施。NPCI表示，WhatsApp在印度已经积累了超过4亿用户，它可以“分级方式”向用户扩展支付，首先，它只能向2000万用户推出支付服务，并且必须与多个银行合作伙伴合作。
谷歌(Google)和沃尔玛(Walmart)目前在印度移动支付市场占据主导地位，合计占据了UPI约80%的市场份额。UPI已经成为印度最受欢迎的数字支付方式，这在一定程度上要归功于新德里在2016年底突然采取行动，使全国85%以上的纸币流通无效。UPI的受欢迎程度削弱了印度几家公司的相关性，包括软银(SoftBank)和阿里巴巴(Alibaba)支持的Paytm，这两家公司多年来一直在打造移动钱包。与UPI应用程序不同，移动钱包不能与其他移动钱包互操作，并向消费者收取少量费用。
WhatsApp于2018年初在印度推出支付服务，很快就陷入了为期两年半的监管迷宫，该国多个机构表达了对用户支付数据的担忧，以及这项Facebook旗下的服务是否比其他支付应用拥有过多的权力和优势。你可以在这里阅读更多关于这方面的内容(付费墙)。
虽然WhatsApp已经消除了这些担忧，但业内资深人士认为，WhatsApp上的支付服务--比国内任何其他智能手机应用都更受欢迎--将比竞争对手更快被采用，因为它的所有潜在用户都已经在用它与朋友聊天了。(例如，谷歌在印度推出了一款独立的支付应用。)。
NPCI今天宣布这一消息的几分钟前，该公司表示，将对第三方应用程序实施上限，以确保没有一款应用程序在一个月内处理的UPI交易超过所有UPI交易的30%。很明显，WhatsApp已经因为印度的监管问题而蒙受了太多损失。印度是WhatsApp最大的用户市场。但NPCI对其他应用实施限制的计划最终应该会在某种程度上对WhatsApp有所帮助--尽管稍后会再次上手。
根据瑞士信贷(Credit Suisse)的数据，印度的移动支付市场岌岌可危，预计到2023年，印度的移动支付市场规模将达到1万亿美元。今天的声明还将帮助WhatsApp进一步进军移动支付市场。WhatsApp正越来越多地寻求多元化进入更多业务。
它于今年6月在巴西推出了支付服务，但很快就被巴西央行勒令暂停这项服务。巴西央行表示，该决定是为了在移动支付领域“保持足够的竞争环境”，并确保“一个可互换、快速、安全、透明、开放和廉价的支付系统的运转”。幸运的是，在印度，UPI快速、开放、可互换、廉价，而且在很大程度上是透明的。
在过去的一年里，Facebook自己也在商务领域大举进军。如果WhatsApp在支付方面获得吸引力，它可能会为母公司开辟更多渠道。Facebook意识到了这一点：今年早些时候，这家社交巨头向印度电信巨头Jio Platforms投资了57亿美元，这是印度科技领域最大的一笔外国直接投资。Facebook高管曾表示，他们计划与Jio平台合作，探索将印度6000万中小企业数字化的方法。Jio Platforms由印度首富穆凯什·安巴尼(Mukesh Ambani)经营。安巴尼也是印度总理莫迪的亲密盟友。
近年来，WhatsApp还在其平台上添加了一系列商务功能。
note_en:
National Payments Corporation of India (NPCI), the body that operates the popular UPI payments infrastructure, said on Thursday evening that it has granted approval to WhatsApp to roll out UPI-powered payments in India.
 Like Google, Samsung and a number of other firms, WhatsApp has built its payments service atop UPI, a payments infrastructure built by a coalition of large banks in India. NPCI said WhatsApp, which has  amassed over 400 million users in India, can expand payments to its users in a “graded manner,” and to start with, it can only roll out the payments service to 20 million users and has to work with multiple banking partners.
   Google and Walmart currently  dominate the mobile payments market in India, together commanding roughly 80% of the UPI market share. UPI has emerged as the most popular digital payments method in India, thanks in part to New Delhi’s abrupt move to invalidate more than 85% of the paper cash circulation in the nation in late 2016. UPI’s popularity has diminished the relevance of several firms in India, including SoftBank and Alibaba-backed Paytm that spent years building mobile wallets. Unlike UPI apps, mobile wallets are not interoperable with other mobile wallets, and levy a small fee to consumers.
 WhatsApp’s payments rollout in India in early 2018 quickly ran into a two-and-a-half-year regulatory maze as various bodies in the country expressed concerns over users’ payments data and whether the  Facebook  -owned service wielded too much power and advantages over other payments apps. You can read more about this  here (paywalled).
 While WhatsApp has been cleared of those concerns, industry veterans believe the payments service on the app — more popular than any other smartphone app in the country — will see a much faster adoption than its rivals as all its potential users are already using it for chatting with friends. (Google launched a standalone payments app in India, for instance.)
 NPCI’s announcement today comes minutes after it said it would be  enforcing a cap on third-party apps to ensure that no single app processes more than 30% of all UPI transactions in a month. It’s evident that WhatsApp has already suffered too much because of regulatory troubles in India, its biggest market by users. But NPCI’s plan to enforce limit on other apps should help WhatsApp in some way eventually — though return to bite again later.
  At stake is India’s mobile payments market, which is estimated to reach $1 trillion by 2023, according to Credit Suisse. Today’s announcement would also help WhatsApp, increasingly looking to diverse into more businesses, make a further push into the mobile payments market.
 It rolled out  payments in Brazil in June this year, but was quickly  ordered to suspend the service by the nation’s central bank. Brazil’s central bank said it took the decision to “preserve an adequate competitive environment” in the mobile payments space and to ensure “functioning of a payment system that’s interchangeable, fast, secure, transparent, open and cheap.” Luckily in India, UPI is fast, open, interchangeable, cheap and, to a large extent, transparent.
 Facebook itself has made a big push in commerce in the past year. And if WhatsApp gains traction with payments, it could open more avenues for its parent firm. Facebook is aware: Earlier this year, the social juggernaut  invested $5.7 billion in Indian telecom giant Jio Platforms, the largest foreign direct investment in the technology space in India. Facebook executives have said that they plan to work with Jio Platforms to  explore ways to digitize India’s 60 million small and medium-sized businesses. Jio Platforms is run by Mukesh Ambani, India’s richest man. Ambani is also a close ally of Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi.
 WhatsApp has also  added a range of commerce features to its platform in recent years.
title: WhatsApp于2018年开始在印度测试其支付服务，拥有100万用户。WhatsApp获得了扩大这项服务的批准，从2000万用户开始
title_en: WhatsApp, which began testing its payments service in India with 1M users in 2018, receives approval to expand the service, starting with 20M users

note:
运营广受欢迎的UPI支付基础设施的印度国家支付公司(National Payments Corporation of India，NPCI)周四晚间表示，将实施上限，以确保没有一款支付应用在一个月内处理超过30%的UPI交易。
该支付机构表示，此举旨在应对“风险”，并“在UPI生态系统进一步扩大的过程中保护其生态系统”。这一变化将于2021年1月生效。(NPCI还批准了WhatsApp在印度扩展支付服务的申请。)。
UPI是由印度大型银行建造的支付基础设施，并得到印度政府的支持。近年来，它已成为中国最受欢迎的数字支付方式。
它补充说，30%的上限将根据前三个月处理的UPI交易总额计算。
一位业内高管称，此举是他们几个月来在印度听到的最荒谬的事情，将严重冲击谷歌和沃尔玛，这两家公司各自的应用程序已经分别处理了超过35%的UPI交易。
事实上，沃尔玛的PhonePe上个月处理了UPI网络上约20亿笔交易中的40%以上。谷歌占据了约38%的交易份额。
目前尚不清楚任何支付应用将如何遵守这一限制。假设PhonePe或Google Pay在三周内已经处理了约6.5亿笔交易。它会在本月剩下的时间里关闭他们的应用程序上的UPI支付吗？
UPI交易量也将下降。一位银行家刚刚发了一条信息：我们擅长自欺欺人。Https://t.co/HgcypgcTln。
今天的声明是印度PhonePe、谷歌支付(Google Pay)和亚马逊支付(Amazon Pay)最新令人头疼的问题，尽管这三家公司的UPI支付应用积累了数千万用户，但它们一直难以将其货币化。UPI目前还没有商业模式。去年年底，在班加罗尔的一次活动中，谷歌支付和下一个10亿用户计划的董事总经理兼业务主管萨吉斯·西万丹(Sajith Sivananda)表示，目前的地方规定迫使谷歌支付在印度运营，没有明确的商业模式，并敦促政府允许他们从支付服务中赚取一些钱。
note_en:
National Payments Corporation of India (NPCI), the body that operates the popular UPI payments infrastructure, said Thursday evening that it will enforce a cap to ensure that no single payments app processes more than 30% of UPI transactions in a month.
 The payments body said the move is aimed at addressing the “risks” and “protecting the UPI ecosystem as it further scales up.” The change goes into effect in January 2021. (NPCI also  approved WhatsApp’s application to extend its payments service in India.)
  UPI is a payments infrastructure built by large banks in India and is backed by the Indian government. It has become the most popular digital payments method in the country in recent years.
 The cap of 30% will be calculated based on total volume of UPI transactions processed in the preceding three months, it added.
  The move, described by an industry executive as the most absurd thing they have heard in months in India, will severely impact Google and  Walmart,   whose respective apps already process more than 35% of UPI transactions each.
 In fact, Walmart’s  PhonePe    processed more than 40% of about 2 billion transactions on UPI network last month. Google commanded about 38% of the transactions.
 It remains unclear how any payments app will comply with this limit. Let’s say PhonePe or Google Pay has already processed about 650 million transactions in three weeks. Would it just switch off UPI payments on their app for the remainder of the month?
 UPI transactions will also drop. A banker just messaged: 'We are good at screwing ourselves'.  https://t.co/HgcypgcTln
 Today’s announcement is the latest headache for PhonePe, Google Pay, and Amazon Pay in India, which, despite amassing tens of millions of users to their UPI payments apps, have struggled to monetize it. UPI currently has no business model. At an event in Bangalore late last year, Sajith Sivanandan, managing director and business head of Google Pay and Next Billion User Initiatives, said current local rules have forced Google Pay to  operate in India without a clear business model, and urged the government to allow them to make some money off their payments services.
title: 印度将实施上限，从2021年1月起，任何单一支付应用每月处理的UPI交易都不会超过所有UPI交易的30%，这将影响Google Pay和PhonePe
title_en: India to enforce a cap so no single payments app processes more than 30% of all UPI transactions per month from January 2021, affecting Google Pay and PhonePe

note:
Ushur是一家开发对话式人工智能和商业自动化解决方案的公司，今天筹集了2500万美元。在一份新闻稿中，该公司表示，新资本将用于加快其销售和营销努力。
随着越来越多的客户代表被要求在马尼拉、美国和其他地方的家中工作，公司正转向人工智能，以弥合由此产生的服务缺口。此外，疫情还提振了对流程发现和自动化的需求。Forrester估计，2019年机器人过程自动化(RPA)及相关子领域为40%的公司创造了就业机会。根据麦肯锡(McKinsey)的一项调查，在大约60%的职业中，至少三分之一的活动可以实现自动化，这可能就是为什么Market and Markets预计，到2022年，仅RPA市场的价值就将达到4930亿美元。
Ushur的产品利用机器学习和业务流程自动化工作流程，通过电子邮件、应用程序、文本、Facebook Messenger等方式吸引客户。它们以可视化构建器、数据提取工具以及与Salesforce和ServiceNow等后端系统以及遗留系统的集成为特色。Ushur表示，使用其软件的公司可以通过分析来衡量参与活动的结果，以审计竞选结果。此外，Ushur可以翻译60多种语言，使公司能够接触到190多个国家的客户。
Ushur提供了一个虚拟助手，通过联系客户，了解他们的需求，并自动采取下一步行动，支持几乎任何渠道的通信。与此同时，这家创业公司的自动电子邮件处理系统会分析数千封收到的电子邮件，并根据预先确定的规则对它们进行分类和分类，自动回复每个发件人，并根据需要进行转发。
Ushur的无代码构建器是一个基于Web的门户，用于构建、部署和跟踪活动自动化。不同的模块允许用户构建工作流程，并通过拖放工具自动执行各种操作或任务，包括客户交互、数据交换、文件上传、光学字符识别等。至于Ushur的FlowBuilder，它是由该公司所称的“语言智能服务架构”(LISA)驱动的。利用自然语言处理、主题分类、数据提取和情感分析，Lisa从对话中提取含义，并为自动化带来智能。除此之外，Ushur的SmartMail允许其保险客户自动处理大量客户、代理人和经纪人的电子邮件，使运营商表面上能够更快、更高效地做出回应。
总部位于加利福尼亚州圣克拉拉的Ushur表示，其客户包括HealthSpire、爱尔兰人寿和Unum等品牌。这次B轮融资由Third Point Ventures牵头，现有投资者8VC参与，这使得Ushur迄今筹集的资金总额达到3600万美元。
note_en:
Ushur, a company developing  conversational AI and business automation solutions, today raised $25 million. In a press release, the company said the fresh capital would be used to accelerate its sales and marketing efforts.
 With customer representatives increasingly required to work from home in  Manila, the U.S., and elsewhere, companies are turning to AI to bridge resulting gaps in service. Moreover, the pandemic has bolstered the demand for process discovery and automation. Forrester  estimates that robotic process automation (RPA) and related subfields created jobs for 40% of companies in 2019. According to a McKinsey  survey, at least a third of activities could be automated in about 60% of occupations, which might be why Market and Markets  anticipates the RPA market alone will be worth $493 billion by 2022.
  Ushur’s products engage customers over email, apps, text, Facebook Messenger, and more using machine learning and business process automation workflows. They feature a visual builder, tools for data extraction, and integrations with backend systems like Salesforce and ServiceNow as well as legacy systems. Ushur says companies that use its software can measure the outcomes of engagements with analytics for auditing campaign results. Moreover, Ushur can translate over 60 languages, giving companies the ability to reach customers in more than 190 countries.
  Ushur offers a virtual assistant that supports communications across virtually any channel by reaching out to customers, understanding what they need, and automatically taking the next steps. Meanwhile, the startup’s automated email processing system analyzes thousands of incoming emails and categorizes and classifies them based on predetermined rules, auto-responding to each sender and forwarding as appropriate.
 Ushur’s no-code builder is a web-based portal to build, deploy, and track active automations. Different modules allow users to build a workflow and automate types of actions or tasks including customer interactions, data exchange, file uploads, optical character recognition, and more with drag-and-drop tools. As for Ushur’s FlowBuilder, it’s powered by what the company calls a “language intelligence service architecture” (LISA). Using natural language processing, topic classification, data extraction, and sentiment analysis, LISA extracts meaning from conversations and brings intelligence to automations. Beyond this, Ushur’s SmartMail allows its insurance clients to process high volumes of customer, agent, and broker email automatically, allowing carriers to ostensibly respond faster and more efficiently.
 Ushur, which is headquartered in Santa Clara, California, says its customers include brands like HealthSpire, Irish Life, and Unum. This series B fundraising was led by Third Point Ventures with participation from existing investor 8VC, and it brings Ushur’s total raised to date to $36 million.
title: Uher正在开发对话式人工智能和工具，以实现客户服务工作流程的自动化，该公司在Third Point Ventures牵头的B系列融资2500万美元
title_en: Usher, which is developing a conversational AI and tools to automate customer service workflows, raises $25M Series B led by Third Point Ventures

索尼表示，其PlayStation5可以比以往任何时候更快地加载虚拟世界，这要归功于有史以来速度最快的固态硬盘之一--但它也不是特别大的硬盘。索尼已经向The Verge证实，你将无法在第一天扩展超快的SSD存储空间。
虽然PS5配备了一个专门的内部插槽，理论上可以安装标准的棒状M.2固态硬盘，并且很容易接触到它，但这个插槽显然是开箱即用的。索尼在接受The Verge采访时说：“他的手机是为将来的更新而保留的。”
如果你一直在密切关注PS5的新闻，这不会让你大吃一惊。PlayStation硬件架构师马克·塞尔尼(Mark Cerny)在3月份的技术预览中花了几分钟时间谈论SSD存储扩展功能，但他当时也表示，SSD的支持可能“有点过时”。(参见下面视频中的20：00到23：30。)。
塞尔尼说：“如果能通过发射来实现这一点，那就太好了，但这可能会有点过时了，所以请在收到我们的消息后再购买M.2硬盘。”
什么事耽搁了？正如Cerny解释的那样，并不是所有的M.2 SSD都能跟上PS5的速度，薄到可以放入SSD托架，或者与索尼的I/O控制器兼容--索尼承诺在今年晚些时候进行兼容性测试，以确保这一点。
“请等我们的消息后再拿到M.2硬盘。”
塞尔尼建议，至少，现成的固态硬盘需要通过PCIe Gen4连接提供超过5.5 GB/秒的带宽，而且散热器不会太大，以至于无法放入PS5的驱动器托架中。
我和几乎每一家PCIe Gen4闪存盘制造商都谈过--只有少数几家--没有一家能告诉我他们的闪存盘能与PS5兼容。两个人认为索尼的兼容性测试计划还没有真正开始。
不过，有几个人持乐观态度，认为他们的硬盘应该符合索尼的要求，我们希望一有机会就亲自测试。
与此同时，你可能会发现自己不得不小心地管理PS5的内部存储空间。据透露，PS5的825 GB固态硬盘可能只有667 GB的可用存储空间。将其与一些PS5发布游戏的大小要求进行比较：
如果你打算购买所有这些游戏，那么你的存储空间已经占了一半。(不过，值得一提的是，《使命召唤》游戏是出了名的存储密集型游戏。)。而且它们并不是发布时唯一可用的游戏。
不过，存储空间对索尼来说并不是一个独有的问题，因为微软还决定为其1TB的Xbox Series X和512 GB的Xbox Series S配备固态硬盘，这两款硬盘的空间分别为802 GB和364 GB。一张299.99美元的Xbox Series S可能看起来不是这样的交易，一旦你增加了一张219.99美元的1TB扩展卡。
好消息是，所有这些游戏机都支持USB外部存储，索尼向我证实，它将在第一天在PS5上推出。Cerny说，这是在PS5中添加大量PS4游戏的好方法，因为它们不需要SSD解锁的速度更快，微软还将允许你从USB3.1存储空间玩Xbox One、Xbox 360和OG Xbox游戏。
最后要注意的是：如果你认为买一台PS5或Xbox附带一个光驱就意味着你不需要所有的内部存储空间，那么事实并非如此。自PS4和Xbox One以来，大多数基于光盘的大型游戏都需要你将其安装到驱动器中。这张光盘可以省去你下载所有比特的麻烦，并充当你的钥匙。
更新时间：美国东部时间下午1：31：Xbox Series S确实有364 GB的可用存储空间，这一点得到了确认(来自我们自己的评估)。
note_en:
Sony says its PlayStation 5 can load virtual worlds  far faster than ever before, thanks to one of the fastest solid-state drives ever made — but it’s also not a particularly  big drive. Sony has confirmed to  The Verge that you won’t be able to expand that blazing-fast SSD storage on day one.
 While the PS5 features a dedicated internal slot that can theoretically fit standard stick-shaped M.2 SSDs and  an easy way to access it, the slot will apparently be disabled out of the box. “[T]his is reserved for a future update,” Sony tells  The Verge.
 If you’ve been paying close attention to PS5 news, this won’t be a big surprise. PlayStation hardware architect Mark Cerny  spent several minutes talking up the SSD storage expansion feature as part of his technical preview back in March, but he also said at the time that support was likely to be “a bit past” launch. (See 20:00 through 23:30 in the video below.)
  “It’d be great if that happened by launch, but it’s likely to be a bit past it, so please hold off on getting that M.2 drive until you hear from us,” Cerny said.
 What’s the holdup? As Cerny explained, not all M.2 SSDs are fast enough to keep up with the PS5, thin enough to fit into the SSD bay, or compatible with Sony’s I/O controller — and Sony promised to do compatibility testing late this year to make sure.
 “Please hold off on getting that M.2 drive until you hear from us”
 At the very least, Cerny suggested, off-the-shelf SSDs would need to deliver more than 5.5GB/sec of bandwidth over a PCIe Gen4 connection, and not have a giant heatsink so large that they won’t fit into the PS5’s drive bay.
 I spoke to practically every manufacturer of a PCIe Gen4 stick drive — there is only a handful — and not a single one was able to tell me their drives will actually work with the PS5. Two suggested that Sony’s compatibility testing program hasn’t actually kicked off yet.
 Several were optimistic, though, suggesting that their drives should meet Sony’s requirements, and we’re hoping to test for ourselves as soon as we get a chance.
 In the meantime, you might find yourself having to manage your PS5’s internal storage carefully. The PS5’s 825GB SSD drive may come with  as little as 667GB of usable storage, according to leaks. Compare that to the size requirements for some PS5 launch games:
  If you’re planning to buy all of these games, that’s half your storage already accounted for. (It’s worth noting that the  Call of Duty games are  notoriously storage-intensive, though.) And they’re  not the only games available at launch.
  Still, storage isn’t going to be a unique problem for Sony since Microsoft also decided to go with solid-state drives for its 1TB Xbox Series X and 512GB Xbox Series S, which have 802GB and  364GB of space, respectively. A $299.99 Xbox Series S might not seem like such a deal  once you add a $219.99 1TB expansion card.
 The good news is that all of these consoles also support USB external storage, and Sony confirms to me that it’ll be available on PS5 on day one. Cerny has said it’s a good way to add lots of PS4 games to your PS5 since they don’t need the faster-speed the SSD can unlock, and Microsoft  will let you play Xbox One, Xbox 360 and OG Xbox games from USB 3.1 storage as well.
 One last note: if you’re thinking that buying a PS5 or Xbox with a disc drive means you won’t need all of that internal storage, that’s not the case. Since the PS4 and Xbox One, most big disc-based games have required you to install them to a drive. The disc just saves you from downloading all the bits and acts as your key.
 Update, 1:31PM ET : Added confirmation (from   our own review ) that the Xbox Series S does have 364GB of usable storage.
title: 索尼确认PS5在发布时不会支持SSD存储扩展，尽管它有一个专用的内部插槽，并表示它“是为未来的更新而保留的”
title_en: Sony confirms PS5 won't support SSD storage expansion at launch, despite the presence of a dedicated internal slot, says it “is reserved for a future update”

在一封致股东的信中，IAC首席执行官乔伊·莱文表示，公司已经“开始考虑将Vimeo剥离给我们的股东。”
莱文继续说：“鉴于Vimeo的成功，以及投资者对软件即服务(SaaS)类别的普遍赞誉，我们预计Vimeo在IAC内部获得资本的成本将比在IAC以外获得资本的成本高得多，这些资本将有助于Vimeo实现其最高抱负。我们刚刚测试了Vimeo通过小额私人筹款获得资本的能力，以支持Vimeo的资产负债表并偿还资本。
今年夏天，Match Group(拥有包括Tinder在内的多种约会服务)完成了与IAC的分离，IAC的所有权分配给了IAC的股东。
与此同时，Vimeo在过去几年里转移了重点--它不是试图与YouTube竞争消费者视频目的地，而是向企业和其他企业销售视频工具。例如，它最近推出了一款名为Vimeo Record的免费视频信息产品。
该公司表示，它拥有150万付费订户和3500多家企业客户，包括亚马逊、星巴克、德勤、Zendesk、Rite Aid和西门子。
新的资金来自Thrive Capital和GIC。根据收益报告，Vimeo在第三季度的收入同比增长44%，达到7510万美元。该公司第一季度EBITDA为正-340万美元。
Vimeo首席执行官安贾利·苏德在一份声明中表示：“我们的目标是从根本上简化企业创建和分享视频的方式，使用比历史上更直观、更具成本效益的工具。”我们很高兴能够获得额外的资本，以Vimeo平台的全部重点和规模追求这一巨大的机会。“
note_en:
In  a letter to shareholders, IAC CEO Joey Levin said the company has “begun contemplating spinning Vimeo off to our shareholders.”
 “Given Vimeo’s success, and investor adulation for the Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) category generally, we expect Vimeo’s access to capital inside of  IAC   will be much more expensive than access to capital outside of IAC, and that capital will be helpful to enable Vimeo to achieve its highest ambitions,” Levin continued, adding, “We just tested Vimeo’s ability to access capital with a small private fundraise to bolster Vimeo’s balance sheet and to repay capital to IAC.”
  Over the summer, Match Group (which owns a variety of dating services, including Tinder)  completed its separation from IAC, with IAC’s ownership distributed to IAC shareholders.
 Vimeo, meanwhile, has shifted its focus over the past couple years — instead of trying to compete with YouTube as a consumer video destination, it sells video tools to enterprises and other businesses. For example, it recently  launched a free video messaging product called Vimeo Record.
 The company says it has 1.5 million paying subscribers and more than 3,500 enterprise clients, including Amazon, Starbucks, Deloitte, Zendesk, Rite Aid and Siemens.
 The new funding comes from Thrive Capital and GIC. According to the earnings report, in Q3, Vimeo grew revenue by 44% year-over-year, to $75.1 million. And it had its first quarter of positive EBITDA — $3.4 million.
 “Our goal is to radically simplify how businesses create and share video, with tools that are far more intuitive and cost-effective than they’ve been historically,” said Vimeo CEO Anjali Sud in a statement. “We’re energized to access additional capital to pursue this enormous opportunity with the full focus and scale of the Vimeo platform.”
title: Vimeo筹集了1.5亿美元，表示第三季度营收同比增长44%，达到7510万美元，拥有150万付费订户，3500多家企业客户，正在考虑从IAC剥离
title_en: Vimeo raises $150M, says revenue grew 44% YoY to $75.1M in Q3, it has 1.5M paying subscribers, 3,500+ enterprise clients, is contemplating a spin-off from IAC

苹果公司今天宣布，从12月8日开始，开发者将被要求在App Store中向用户提供新的隐私细节。这些隐私“营养标签”于今年夏天首次在WWDC上推出，苹果公司表示，其目标是更好地告知消费者个人应用程序的隐私做法。
在苹果开发者网页上的一篇帖子中，苹果公司证实，从12月8日开始，新的应用和App Store的更新将需要新的隐私细节。从今天开始，开发者也可以通过App Store Connect提交这些细节：
今年晚些时候，App Store将帮助用户在任何苹果平台上下载应用程序之前，了解该应用程序的隐私做法。在每款应用程序的产品页面上，用户可以了解该应用程序可能收集的一些数据类型，以及这些数据是链接到它们还是用于跟踪它们。你现在可以在App Store Connect中输入你的应用的隐私信息。从2020年12月8日开始，向App Store提交新的应用程序和应用程序更新将需要这些信息。
苹果公司强调，开发者在为应用程序准备App Privacy“营养标签”时，应该记住几条不同的重要信息：
您应该确定所有可能的数据收集和使用，即使某些数据将仅在有限的情况下收集和使用。
你有责任保持你的回复准确和最新。如果您的做法发生变化，请在App Store Connect中更新您的响应。
同样，从12月8日开始，开发者将被要求填写这些信息，才能获得新的应用程序和应用程序更新。这也是我们很可能会在App Store上看到新的详细信息的时候。
对应用程序的隐私做法进行透明的概述是与潜在用户建立信任的关键。开发者现在有机会在App Store中详细说明他们的应用程序的隐私做法，供用户查看，包括应用程序可能收集的数据类型，这些数据是否与第三方共享，以及用户可以选择退出。
你正在阅读朝九晚五的Mac--日复一日发布苹果及其周边生态系统新闻的专家。请务必查看我们的主页以获取所有最新消息，并在Twitter、Facebook和LinkedIn上关注9to5Mac以保持最新消息。不知从何说起？查看我们的独家报道、评论、操作指南，并订阅我们的YouTube频道
note_en:
Apple has announced today that developers will be required to provide new privacy details to users in the App Store starting December 8. These privacy “nutrition labels” were first introduced at WWDC over the summer, with Apple saying the goal is to better inform consumers of the privacy practices of individual applications.
  In a post on  the Apple Developer webpage today, Apple confirmed that the new privacy details will be required for new apps and app updates to the App Store starting on December 8. And starting today, the details can also be submitted by developers through App Store Connect:
 Later this year, the App Store will help users understand an app’s privacy practices before they download the app on any Apple platform. On each app’s product page, users can learn about some of the data types the app may collect, and whether that data is linked to them or used to track them. You can now enter your app’s privacy information in App Store Connect. This information will be required to submit new apps and app updates to the App Store starting December 8, 2020.
 Apple has emphasized that there are several different pieces of important information that developers should remember while preparing the App Privacy “nutrition labels” for their applications:
 You should identify all possible data collections and uses, even if certain data will be collected and used only in limited situations.
  You’re responsible for keeping your responses accurate and up to date. If your practices change, update your responses in App Store Connect.
 Again, starting on December 8, developers will be required to have this information completed for new apps and app updates. This is also when we will likely see the new details appear in the App Store.
 A transparent overview of an app’s privacy practices is key to building trust with potential users. Developers now have the opportunity to detail their app’s privacy practices right in the App Store for users to review, including the types of data the apps might collect, whether that data is shared with third parties, and the option for users to opt out.
  You’re reading 9to5Mac — experts who break news about Apple and its surrounding ecosystem, day after day. Be sure to check out  our homepage for all the latest news, and follow 9to5Mac on  Twitter,  Facebook, and  LinkedIn to stay in the loop. Don’t know where to start? Check out our  exclusive stories,  reviews,  how-tos, and  subscribe to our YouTube channel

title_en: Apple says developers will be required to provide new privacy “nutrition labels” to users in the App Store starting December 8

note:
(路透社)-两位知情人士周四表示，美国房屋租赁公司Airbnb Inc.计划最早在下周初公开其首次公开募股(IPO)注册，这将为下个月的股市首次公开募股(IPO)设定方向，尽管新冠肺炎疫情加剧。
首次公开募股(IPO)申请将让外界首次详细了解Airbnb的业务。这将揭示该公司在病毒爆发后的重塑，迫使其将重点从城市公寓转向度假屋租赁。随着度假者在假期期间冷落酒店以练习社交距离，对房屋挂牌的需求激增。
根据路透社(Reuters)的统计，美国周三创下了新冠状病毒病例的单日纪录，至少报告了102591例新感染病例。
消息人士称，Aibnb计划设定IPO价格区间，并在12月启动投资者路演，并警告称，具体时间取决于市场状况。
本周，美国大选降低了IPO候选人的不确定性，因为分裂的政府不会增税的前景推动了股市反弹。芝加哥期权交易所波动率指数(CBOE Volatility Index)在大选前飙升至4个月高位后，已触及两周低点。波动率指数是一项衡量短期波动性的指标，受到IPO候选人的密切关注。
Airbnb将成为2020年规模最大的股票上市之一，今年对IPO来说已经是轰动一时的一年。唱片公司华纳音乐集团(Warner Music Group)、数据分析公司Palantir Technologies和数据仓库公司雪花(Snowflake Inc.)等公司今年上市。
路透社(Reuters)上个月报道称，Airbnb的目标是筹集约30亿美元，并表示它可能在IPO中实现超过300亿美元的估值。
在此之前，中国经济较今年早些时候出现了戏剧性的复苏。今年4月，在第一波新冠肺炎疫情期间，Airbnb从包括银湖(Silver Lake)和第六街合伙公司(Six Street Partners)在内的投资者那里获得了紧急资金。
该公司在7月份表示，自3月3日以来，客户在一天内的预订数量首次超过100万晚。
note_en:
(Reuters) - U.S. home rental company Airbnb Inc plans to make its initial public offering (IPO) registration public as early next week, setting course for a stock market debut next month even as the COVID-19 pandemic intensifies, two people familiar with the matter said on Thursday.
 The IPO filing will give outsiders their first detailed look into Airbnb’s business. It will shed light on the company’s reinvention after the virus outbreak pushed it to shift focus from city apartments to holiday home rentals. It has seen demand for house listings surge as vacationers snub hotels to practice social distancing during vacation breaks.
 The United States set a one-day record for new coronavirus cases on Wednesday, with at least 102,591 new infections reported, according to a Reuters tally.
  Aibnb plans to set an IPO price range and kick off an investor roadshow in December, the source said, cautioning that the timing is subject to market conditions.
 The U.S. election diminished uncertainty for IPO hopefuls this week, as the prospect of a divided government that would not raise taxes fueled a stock market rally. The CBOE volatility index, a gauge for short-term volatility that is closely monitored by IPO candidates, has hit a two-week low after spiking to a four-month high in the run-up to the election.
 Airbnb is set to be one of the largest stock market listings of 2020 in what is already a blockbuster year for IPOs. The likes of record label Warner Music Group, data analytics firm Palantir Technologies and data warehouse company Snowflake Inc went public this year.
  Reuters reported last month that Airbnb was aiming to raise around $3 billion, and that it could achieve a valuation of more than $30 billion in the IPO.
 It would follow a dramatic recovery from earlier this year. Airbnb secured emergency funding from investors, including Silver Lake and Sixth Street Partners, in April, amid the first wave of the COVID-19 pandemic.
 The company said in July that customers had booked more than one million nights in a single day for the first time since March 3.
title: 消息来源：Airbnb计划最早下周公开IPO注册，下月亮相
title_en: Source: Airbnb plans to make its IPO registration public as early as next week and debut next month

note:
彭博社的Katie Roof今日报道称，goPuff正在洽谈收购酒精饮料连锁店BevMo，goPuff刚刚发布新闻稿，确认已达成收购协议，价格为3.5亿美元。
正如联合创始人兼联合首席执行官雅基尔·戈拉上个月解释的那样，这家初创公司在30分钟或更短的时间内就能送到你在便利店里能找到的各种产品(如非处方药、婴儿食品和酒精)，而且它一周七天、每天24小时提供这些送货服务。
GoPuff直到最近才引起媒体的关注，尽管它在美国500多个城市开展业务，并得到了Accel、软银愿景基金(SoftBank Vision Fund)等机构的支持。随着最近一轮融资-使其总融资达到13.5亿美元-这种情况开始改变，goPuff收购了一家标志性的零售商，引起了更大的轰动。
公告暗示，通过收购BevMo(在加州、亚利桑那州和华盛顿州经营着161家门店)，该公司可以加快向加州的扩张。
首先，goPuff现在可以向BevMo的实体客户推广其送货服务。该公司还表示，将把BevMo的一些实体店整合到其微履行网络中，同时不会改变商店的客户体验。
GoPuff联合创始人兼联合首席执行官拉斐尔·伊利沙耶夫在一份声明中表示：“我们很自豪能将goPuff的业务带到加州，并期待着在全州投资人才和房地产。”“与BevMo合作！快速推进我们的战略目标，即为新地区的更多客户提供满足其即时需求的无缝解决方案。通过这次收购，goPuff将在全国各地开展业务，巩固我们作为一家领先的全国性消费企业的存在。“。
克努森说：“加入goPuff，一家创造了真正差异化的方法并定义了即时需求类别的公司，将使我们能够更好地满足我们消费者不断变化的需求，包括直接将日常必需品送到他们的家门口。”我们期待着帮助将goPuff引入加州，并共同努力进一步提升BevMo的体验！客户和我们的整个社区。“。
这笔交易预计将在30天内完成。BevMo之前为私募股权公司Towerbrook Capital Partners所有。
note_en:
Bloomberg’s Katie Roof  reported today that goPuff was in talks to buy alcoholic beverage chain BevMo, and  goPuff   just put out a press release confirming that it has reached an acquisition agreement for a price of $350 million.
 As co-founder and co-CEO Yakir Gola  explained last month, the startup delivers the kinds of products you’d find in a convenience store (such as over-the-counter medicine, baby food and alcohol) in 30 minutes or less — and it offers those deliveries 24 hours a day, seven days a week.
  GoPuff hadn’t attracted much media attention until recently, despite operating in more than 500 U.S. cities, with backing from Accel, SoftBank Vision Fund and others. That started to change with the recent round —  which brought its total funding to $1.35 billion — and goPuff is making an even bigger splash by acquiring an iconic retailer.
 The announcement suggests that by acquiring BevMo (which operates 161 stores throughout California, Arizona and Washington), the company can accelerate its expansion into California.
  For one thing, goPuff can now promote its delivery offerings to BevMo’s brick-and-mortar customers. The company also says it will integrate some of BevMo’s brick-and-mortar stores into its microfulfillment network, while not changing the customer experience in stores.
 “We’re proud to bring goPuff’s operations to California and look forward to investing in talent and real estate across the state,” said goPuff co-founder and co-CEO Rafael Ilishayev in a statement. “Partnering with BevMo! quickly advances our strategic objectives of providing more customers in new geographies with a seamless solution for their instant needs. Through this acquisition, goPuff will operate coast-to-coast, solidifying our presence as a leading, national consumer business.”
  “Joining goPuff, a company that has created a truly differentiated approach and defined the instant needs category, will allow us to better meet our consumers’ evolving needs, including delivering everyday essentials directly to their doorstep,” Knutsen said. “We look forward to helping introduce goPuff to California and working together to further enhance the experience for BevMo! customers and our communities at large.”
 The deal is expected to close within 30 days. BevMo was previously owned by private equity firm Towerbrook Capital Partners.
title: GoPuff在不到30分钟的时间内将便利店商品送到家，它以3.5亿美元收购了酒类连锁店BevMo；goPuff在10月份以39亿美元的估值筹集了3.8亿美元
title_en: goPuff, which delivers convenience store items in under 30 minutes, buys liquor store chain BevMo for $350M; goPuff raised $380M in October at a $3.9B valuation

在上周发布候选版本之后，iOS14.2现在对所有iPhone用户开放。苹果还发布了适用于老款设备的iPadOS 14.2和iOS 12.4.9。
IOS 14.2包括了各种变化和新功能，包括100多个新的表情符号和新的壁纸。它也支持带有MagSafe的iPhone12皮套，不过我们还没有确定这个配件的发布日期。
在其他地方，iOS 14.2将现在正在播放的控件与重新设计的控制中心的AirPlay 2控件一起带到了锁屏上。IOS 14.2的另一个新变化是全新的Shazam切换功能，可以添加到Control Center中。
要将新的Shazam音乐识别切换添加到Control Center，首先要确保您运行的是iOS 14.2的开发者测试版，该版本将于今天发布。然后，打开设置应用程序，选择“控制中心”，然后在“更多控制”标题下查找Shazam。然后，您可以添加Shazam切换并按您认为合适的方式对其进行重新排列。
IOS 14.2还为AirPods和AirPods Pro带来了优化的电池充电功能。这一功能旨在减少电池老化，延长AirPods电池的整体续航时间。这意味着iOS 14.2将学习你如何以及何时给你的AirPods充电，直到它认为你即将把它们从充电器上取下来，才能一直充电到100%的容量。

note_en:
After releasing the Release Candidate version last week, iOS 14.2 is now available to all iPhone users. Apple has also released iPadOS 14.2 as well as iOS 12.4.9 for older devices.
  iOS 14.2 includes a variety of changes and new features, including over 100 new emoji as well as new wallpapers. There is also support for the iPhone 12 Leather Sleeve with MagSafe, although we still don’t have a release date for that accessory.
   Elsewhere, iOS 14.2 brings  revamped now playing controls to the lock screen alongside redesigned AirPlay 2 controls in Control Center. Another one of the new changes in iOS 14.2 is a  brand new Shazam toggle that can be added to Control Center.
 To add the new Shazam music recognition toggle to Control Center, first make sure you’re running the developer beta of iOS 14.2, which is rolling out today. Then, open the Settings app, choose “Control Center,” then look for Shazam beneath the “More Controls” header. You can then add the Shazam toggle and rearrange it as you see fit.
    iOS 14.2 also brings an optimized battery charging feature to AirPods and AirPods Pro. This feature is designed to reduce battery aging and extend the overall lifespan of your AirPods’ battery. What this means is that iOS 14.2 will learn how and when you charge your  AirPods and wait until it thinks you’re about to take them off the charger to charge all the way to 100% capacity.
  Over 100 new emoji, including animals, food, faces, household objects, musical instruments, gender-inclusive emoji, and more
  Magnifier can detect people nearby and report their distance using the LiDAR sensor included in iPhone 12 Pro and iPhone 12 Pro Max
  Optimized battery charging for AirPods to slow the rate of battery aging by reducing the time your AirPods spends fully charged
   Intercom support with HomePod and HomePod mini using iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, AirPods, and CarPlay
 Ability to connect HomePod to Apple TV 4K for stereo, surround sound, and Dolby Atmos audio
 Option to provide statistics about Exposure Notifications, without identifying you, to participating Public Health Authorities
 iOS 14.2 also resolves the following bugs and performance issues. There are fixes for the Camera application, Voice Memos, Apple Cash, and much more. Here are those improvements and bug fixes:
 The keyboard on the Lock Screen could miss touches when trying to enter the passcode
         Workout GPS routes or Health data are prevented from syncing between Apple Watch and iPhone for some users
   Exposure Notifications is disabled when restoring iPhone from iCloud Backup or transferring data to a new iPhone using iPhone Migration
    Over 100 new emoji, including animals, food, faces, household objects, musical instruments, gender-inclusive emoji, and more

 Scene Detection in Camera uses intelligent image recognition to identify objects within a scene and automatically improves the photo on iPad Air (4th generation)
 Auto FPS in Camera automatically reduces the frame rate when recording video to improve low light capture and to optimize file size on iPad Air (4th generation)
